{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Fisher Remnant
| introduced = cradle-04-skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|A [[Fisher Remnant]] was used by [[Lindon]] and Gesha for dissection.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c4">''Skysworn'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|A [[Fisher Remnant]] arm can have a [[Snare]] [[binding]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c7">''Skysworn'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
